title: Yeo's Asian Drink (Chrysanthemum, SoyaBean, WinterMelon, LemonBarley, Lychee, Bandung, Coconut)
detail_text: 1 carton = 24 cans With a corporate history that extends more than a hundred years, Yeo’s (also known as YHS or Yeo Hiap Seng) has grown from strength to strength, from its humble beginnings as a striving enterprise in pre-war Singapore, to its transformation as a food & beverage conglomerate with a global network that spans Asia-Pacific, Europe, North America and Oceanic regions. A category leader in the Asian drinks market, Yeo’s has broadened its customer reach and entrenched its industry presence through a combination of geographical expansion and product diversification. On the beverage business front, Yeo’s competitive advantage lies in the Group’s ability to stay true and current to consumers’ changing palettes and individual preferences based on lifestyle and cultural differences. With a century of heritage, the Yeo's brand bears the hallmark of superior product quality. Yeos is committed to meeting evolving consumer needs and growing market demands through continued product innovation.

title: Forest Cloud Ran Matcha Powder for Lattes & Baking No Sugar Added
detail_text: Ran Matcha is a bold and expressive matcha designed for those who enjoy intensity and depth in flavor. Made from the Jiu Keng cultivar, the leaves are shaded to enhance their natural complexity before being ground into a fine, vibrant powder. Its aroma carries hints of roasted nuts and the sea, promising a flavor experience that is both robust and nuanced. The taste is full bodied from the first sip, with pistachio-like creaminess giving way to a savory, oceanic character akin to nori sheets. The flavor deepens further with the buttery, rounded sweetness of cashew nuts, creating a profile that is both rich and lingering. Ran Matcha’s strong character holds up beautifully in lattes and shines in culinary creations, adding depth to pastries, desserts, and any recipe where matcha’s distinctive flavor is celebrated. Packaging Opening & Storage Guide : Open from the side notch. Pinch the tip and tear in one direction along the perforation. Do not cut the top as it may detach the zip seal. After use, press the zip to reseal and squeeze out excess air. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat, humidity and direct sunlight. For best freshness, reseal tightly or transfer to an airtight container, and follow the Best Before date on pack.
